stories.original_headline: A lost moon may have created Titan and Saturn’s rings
stories.original_summary: Saturn’s largest moon, Titan, may have been born in a colossal cosmic crash. New research suggests Titan formed when two older moons slammed together hundreds of millions of years ago—an event so violent it reshaped Saturn’s entire moon system and may have indirectly sparked the formation of its ico
stories.fantasy_headline: Ancient lore reveals Titan's birth from a celestial collision!
stories.fantasy_story: Long ago, wise stargazers believed the great moon Titan was born from a colossal celestial collision. Two ancient moons, now lost to time, once slammed together, reshaping the very dance of the night sky and perhaps even forming the famed rings around the giant planet.

stories.original_headline: James Webb reveals a barred spiral galaxy shockingly early in the Universe
stories.original_summary: Astronomers have spotted what may be one of the universe’s earliest barred spiral galaxies — a striking cosmic structure forming just 2 billion years after the Big Bang. The galaxy, COSMOS-74706, dates back about 11.5 billion years and contains a stellar bar, a bright, linear band of stars and gas s
stories.fantasy_headline: Great Scrying Orb unveils early spiral of stars from Creation's dawn.
stories.fantasy_story: The Star-gazers' Guild, using the powerful Great Scrying Orb, has glimpsed an astonishing spiral of stars. This celestial tapestry, named Cosmos-74706, appeared shockingly early after the Grand Creation, revealing a bright, linear band of stars and gas in its ancient heart.

stories.original_headline: Tenways nearly perfects the shareable city e-bike
stories.original_summary: Good electric bikes are expensive. So why not buy one and share it? That's the idea behind the Tenways CGO Compact e-bike I've been sharing with my wife and teenage daughter for the last two weeks. It adapts in seconds without any tools to comfortably fit riders of varying heights thanks to its low-
stories.fantasy_headline: Tenways Guild unveils the perfect shareable enchanted steed!
stories.fantasy_story: The esteemed Tenways Guild has crafted a wondrous new enchanted steed for the townsfolk. While such magical chariots usually cost many gold coins, this clever design allows entire families to share one. It magically adjusts its form to fit riders of all heights, needing no tools at all.
